falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below its 200-day moving average by more than 3%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bearish trend, contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of a downtrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the CBOE VIX rises above 30 and remains there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained elevated volatility would signal market panic or a blowoff top, invalidating the HOLD verdict by showing extreme fear contrary to the pattern's expected resolution.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a surprise 50-basis-point rate hike at its next policy meeting
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would create a clear macroeconomic shock invalidating the pattern's assumption of stable conditions, forcing a reevaluation of the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
